descriptor.accessibility_note: Presence and handoff cues keep an icon and label across themes; provider-only motion gaps are declared honestly.
Cached, stale, and partial row badges stay readable at every density and contrast.
Shell chrome around embedded content qualifies on every row; provider-only repaint gaps are declared, not hidden.
Run, error, and stale chrome stay legible and labelled across every theme, density, and reduced motion.
Destructive and blocked states keep an icon and label across every theme, density, and reduced motion.
Preview-only and stale badges spell out the state in text across every theme and density.
Flame intensities keep a legible legend across themes; reduced motion stills the playhead sweep.
Pass, fail, and blocked cards keep an icon and label in every theme, density, and reduced motion.
Sync-pending and conflict states keep an icon and label across every theme, density, and reduced motion.
Replay timeline labels survive every theme and density; reduced motion stills the scrub animation.
